title: tragium columnae
intro: Tragium columnae, also known as Tragopogon columnae or Tragopogon crocus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve coughs, and treat respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tragium columnae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Tragium columnae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
